title: Anthropic Just Dropped a Masterclass on Building Agent Harnesses (for Large Codebases)
summary: Cole Medin demonstrates how to build an "AI Layer" harness for Claude Code in large codebases, implementing Anthropic's playbook with concrete components: CLAUDE.md hierarchy, self-improving hooks, scoped skills, LSP, MCP, subagents, and bundling plugins. The example codebase is fully implemented and validated on GitHub.
